The issue was in the `valid()` function of the `InstructionsState` class, which was incorrectly requiring both `MainOp` and `AltOp` to be non-null, when the comment clearly states it should only require `MainOp` to be non-null. I changed line 1283 from `return MainOp && AltOp;` to `return MainOp != nullptr;`, which addresses the root cause of the assertion failure in `getMainOp()`.

```bash
# Verify the fix is in place one final time
cat /llvm-autofix/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/SLPVectorizer.cpp | grep -A2 -B2 "bool valid() const"
```
